data.title: Intelligent Protection Management Highlights 2025 Transformation and Growth
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Intelligent Protection Management ( (IPM) ) has issued an announcement.

Intelligent Protection Management Corp. has released an investor presentation outlining its positioning as a U.S.-based managed technology solutions provider specializing in cybersecurity and cloud infrastructure, highlighting its secure private cloud, 24/7 support model, and deep experience in regulated industries. The materials underscore IPM’s focus on delivering cost-efficient, security-centric IT services, leveraging long-term data center leases and a scalable infrastructure footprint to support enterprises and smaller businesses alike.

The presentation details IPM’s transformation following its January 2025 acquisition of Newtek Technology Solutions for cash and preferred stock, which added more than 50 employees and over 17,000 customers and made the first quarter of 2025 its initial operational quarter as a managed IT solutions provider. For full-year 2025, IPM reported $23.6 million in revenue with deferred revenue of $3.9 million, a 42% decline in net loss and positive adjusted EBITDA in the fourth quarter, supported by a business mix led by managed information technology services, and it highlighted cross-selling opportunities and a referral agreement with NewtekOne alongside a predictable, high-margin model as key elements of its growth strategy.

The most recent analyst rating on (IPM) stock is a Hold with a $1.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Intelligent Protection Management stock, see the IPM Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on IPM Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, IPM is a Neutral.

The score is primarily supported by improving fundamentals (sharp 2025 revenue rebound, positive operating/free cash flow, and a low-leverage balance sheet) and constructive earnings-call progress (Q4 adjusted EBITDA turning positive and operational milestones). These are tempered by continued GAAP losses, a technically weak price trend (below key moving averages), and a less-informative negative P/E with no dividend yield provided.

To see Spark’s full report on IPM stock, click here.

More about Intelligent Protection Management

Intelligent Protection Management Corp. is a managed technology solutions provider focused on cybersecurity and cloud infrastructure for enterprises, commercial clients and small and medium-sized businesses across the U.S. The company offers managed IT security services, secure private cloud hosting, managed backup and disaster recovery, web hosting, professional and procurement services, and consulting for highly regulated industries such as banking, finance, healthcare, legal, energy, manufacturing and retail.

IPM operates U.S.-based leased Tier III data centers on both coasts with scalable, redundant infrastructure and no bandwidth consumption fees, and emphasizes security-first, high-touch service with CIS- and SOC 2-certified staff. It supports enterprise, mid-market and small-business customers on the same platform, maintains long-tenured personnel and high client retention, and also acts as a large white-label service provider for major technology vendors in regulated sectors.

Average Trading Volume: 105,998

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $14.81M

See more data about IPM stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: reAlpha Finalizes CFO Separation Agreement and Severance Terms
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from reAlpha Tech Corp. ( (AIRE) ).

On February 25, 2026, reAlpha Tech Corp. terminated the employment of Chief Financial Officer Piyush Phadke, and on March 16, 2026, the two parties executed a separation agreement that formalized his exit. The agreement grants Phadke severance equal to two months of base salary, paid over a two‑month period starting March 31, 2026, and accelerates the vesting of 82,539 restricted stock units into an equivalent number of common shares, while all other unvested equity awards were forfeited and cancelled, clarifying the company’s financial and governance obligations related to his departure.

This separation package, which includes a broad release of claims and standard confidentiality and non‑disparagement provisions, closes out Phadke’s compensation arrangements and removes future vesting liabilities from reAlpha’s balance sheet. The resolution provides stakeholders with greater transparency around the cost and structure of the CFO transition, while signaling the company’s intent to manage executive departures through defined cash severance and equity acceleration terms that balance contractual commitments with the need to limit ongoing obligations.

The most recent analyst rating on (AIRE) stock is a Buy with a $2.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on reAlpha Tech Corp. stock, see the AIRE Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on AIRE Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, AIRE is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held back by heavy losses and sustained cash burn despite rapid revenue growth and improved leverage. Weak technicals reinforce near-term risk, while positive corporate developments (expansion and M&A plans) provide some offset; valuation signals are limited due to the negative P/E and no dividend.

To see Spark’s full report on AIRE stock, click here.

More about reAlpha Tech Corp.

reAlpha Tech Corp. operates in the technology and real estate sector, focusing on technology-enabled real estate investment and management solutions. The company leverages digital tools and structured equity incentives to attract and retain senior executives while aligning leadership compensation with shareholder interests.

Average Trading Volume: 4,384,842

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

data.title: Belrise Industries Raises Rs. 100 Crore via Unlisted A1+ Rated Commercial Paper
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from Belrise Industries Limited ( (IN:BELRISE) ) is now available.

Belrise Industries Limited has raised Rs. 100 crore through the private placement of commercial paper, continuing its earlier funding program disclosed at the end of January 2026. The instrument carries a 12-month tenure, an 8% annual coupon, and has been allotted to Karur Vysya Bank Limited with a Crisil A1+ rating, indicating strong short-term credit quality despite the paper not being listed and being unsecured.

The commercial paper was allotted on March 20, 2026, and will mature on March 20, 2027, with both interest and principal payable in a bullet repayment at maturity. This funding move enhances the company’s short-term liquidity and financial flexibility, signaling confidence from institutional lenders and rating agencies, and may support ongoing operational or working capital needs without creating encumbered assets.

More about Belrise Industries Limited

Belrise Industries Limited is a listed Indian company with its equity shares traded on both BSE and the National Stock Exchange under the symbol BELRISE. The company operates under ISIN INE894V01022 and regularly accesses domestic capital markets to meet its financing and operational requirements.

Average Trading Volume: 704,651

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: 157.8B INR

data.title: Almonty Narrows Path to Production at Sangdong as Tungsten Surge Lifts Revenue but Accounting Charge Swings 2025 to Deep Loss
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Almonty Industries ( (TSE:AII) ) has provided an update.

Almonty Industries reported higher 2025 revenue of $32.5 million, up 13%, as surging tungsten APT prices supported its mining operations, but the company posted a steep net loss of $161.9 million largely due to a non-cash charge from revaluing embedded derivative liabilities tied to sharply rising share prices. Despite weaker adjusted EBITDA and significantly higher general and administrative expenses linked to financing and regulatory activities, Almonty strengthened its balance sheet with a US$129.4 million equity raise, ending the year with $268.4 million in cash and cash equivalents.

Operationally, Almonty reached a key inflection point with the first ore delivered to the run-of-mine pad at its Sangdong Tungsten Mine in South Korea, signaling the transition from development to active mining ahead of commercial production, and formally commissioned the project in March 2026. The company also expanded its North American footprint with the acquisition of the Gentung Tungsten Project in Montana and bolstered its leadership team, moves aimed at optimizing future tungsten deliveries and advancing additional projects that could enhance its role as a critical supplier in the global tungsten market.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:AII) stock is a Hold with a C$23.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Almonty Industries stock, see the TSE:AII Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on AII Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, AII is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by very weak financial performance, including collapsing margins, large losses, and ongoing cash burn despite improving revenue and lower leverage. Technicals provide partial support via a strong longer-term trend but mixed short-term momentum. Valuation is moderate based on the provided P/E, with no dividend data to add support.

To see Spark’s full report on AII stock, click here.

More about Almonty Industries

Almonty Industries Inc. is a global producer of tungsten concentrate with operations spanning South Korea, the United States and other jurisdictions. The company focuses on developing and operating high-grade tungsten and molybdenum projects, positioning itself as a strategic supplier to Western industrial and defense supply chains amid tightening global tungsten markets.

Average Trading Volume: 858,742

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$6.18B

data.title: Otello Expands Share Buyback as Treasury Holdings Climb Above 4.3 Million Shares
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from Otello Corporation ASA ( (GB:0FI5) ).

Otello Corporation ASA has continued its ongoing share buyback program, repurchasing 97,200 shares between 16 and 20 March 2026 at an average price of NOK 17.05, bringing the total acquired under the current mandate to 651,356 shares for NOK 11.55 million. The program, authorized by shareholders in September 2025, allows purchases of up to 3,689,541 shares at a maximum price of NOK 20 per share, and Otello now holds 4,340,897 treasury shares, signaling a sustained commitment to capital return and potentially supporting its share price and earnings-per-share metrics.

The buyback activity underscores Otello’s use of balance sheet flexibility to consolidate ownership and optimize its capital structure, which may be viewed positively by investors seeking enhanced shareholder value. By maintaining room under the authorized limit and continuing to buy at a discount to the NOK 20 ceiling, the company retains headroom for further market operations while demonstrating confidence in its valuation and long-term prospects.

More about Otello Corporation ASA

Otello Corporation ASA is a Norway-based technology company whose shares trade on the stock exchange. The company actively manages its capital structure through share buyback programs, holding a sizeable portfolio of treasury shares as part of its shareholder-return strategy.

Average Trading Volume: 129,117

Current Market Cap: NOK1.22B

data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Super League Enterprise ( (SLE) ) has shared an announcement.

On March 16, 2026, Super League Enterprise, Inc. agreed to acquire the Misfits Ads Business from Esports Now, LLC, paying $1.5 million in cash at closing plus equity, pre-funded warrants and a warrant package, along with a $300,000 delayed cash payment and potential earnout consideration tied to gross profit and market capitalization milestones. Closing is subject to shareholder approval, regulatory clearances and key contract consents, and Misfits will gain board representation at Super League through an independent designee.

The deal is positioned as a strategic expansion of Super League’s advertising platform, adding programmatic revenue streams, rewarded video technology, creator relationships and new data and brand partnerships to support its path toward positive adjusted EBITDA after a prior restructuring and PIPE financing. Super League and Misfits will also enter a preferred commercial partnership to run brand integrations across Misfits’ large owned game portfolio, while integration, execution, competition and transaction-related risks could influence whether the anticipated benefits and earnout payments are ultimately realized.

The most recent analyst rating on (SLE) stock is a Hold with a $5.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Super League Enterprise stock, see the SLE Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on SLE Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SLE is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial fundamentals (losses, negative operating cash flow, and negative equity) and a clearly bearish technical trend. Offsetting factors include a more constructive earnings-call outlook and positive corporate actions (debt elimination, pipeline growth, and capital structure/strategy initiatives), but valuation support is limited due to ongoing losses.

To see Spark’s full report on SLE stock, click here.

More about Super League Enterprise

Super League Enterprise, Inc. is a Nasdaq-listed audience intelligence and media activation company that connects brands with the global gaming population. It combines proprietary data, immersive ad formats and scalable distribution to translate gamer behavior into measurable marketing performance across gaming environments, digital video, social media and connected TV.

The company targets advertisers seeking to reach hard-to-access gaming audiences at scale and aims to expand margins as its data and distribution assets grow, reinforcing its competitive position in the gaming-focused digital advertising market.

data.title: Greene County Bancorp MHC Granted Dividend Waiver Approval
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Greene County Bancorp ( (GCBC) ) has shared an update.

On March 19, 2026, Greene County Bancorp, MHC obtained nonobjection from the Federal Reserve Bank of Philadelphia to waive its right to receive up to $0.64 per share in dividends paid by Greene County Bancorp, Inc. over the four quarters ending March 31, June 30, September 30, and December 31, 2026. The MHC has indicated that, subject to its cash flow needs, it intends to waive these dividends, a move that effectively preserves more cash for the company’s public shareholders and may support capital flexibility and shareholder returns during this period.

The company also flagged that its statements regarding dividend intentions are subject to significant risks and uncertainties, including economic conditions, interest rate changes, regulatory factors, and competition. This underscores that while the waiver currently benefits minority shareholders and could strengthen the company’s capital position, the actual outcomes for stakeholders may vary depending on broader market and regulatory developments.

The most recent analyst rating on (GCBC) stock is a Buy with a $25.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Greene County Bancorp stock, see the GCBC Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on GCBC Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GCBC is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by strong financial performance (profitability, revenue growth, and solid cash conversion) and supportive valuation (low P/E). Corporate updates are constructive (record profitability and dividend increase), while technical indicators are the main restraint due to weak trend positioning below key moving averages and negative MACD.

To see Spark’s full report on GCBC stock, click here.

More about Greene County Bancorp

Greene County Bancorp, MHC is the mutual holding company and 54.1% majority owner of Greene County Bancorp, Inc., a U.S. banking organization. Through its ownership stake, the MHC oversees the company’s capital management and dividend policy, which are important to the firm’s shareholder base and its positioning within the regional financial services market.

Galactic Gold Corp. ( (TSE:GGAU) ) has provided an update.

Galactic Gold Corp. will settle $25,000 of outstanding debt by issuing 113,636 common shares at a deemed price of $0.22, with the shares subject to a four-month hold and contingent on TSX Venture Exchange approval. The company is also granting stock options for up to 600,000 shares and issuing 200,000 restricted share and deferred units at $0.22, aligning consultants and a director with shareholder interests and modestly strengthening its balance sheet without using cash.

These equity-based moves underscore the junior miner’s reliance on stock-driven incentives and capital management tools typical in the exploration sector. By conserving cash while deepening insider and consultant participation, Galactic Gold is aiming to support ongoing work at its Ontario gold properties and maintain operational flexibility in a capital-constrained resource market.

More about Galactic Gold Corp.

Galactic Gold Corp. is a resource development company focused on advancing its 100%-owned Hardrock West Properties in Ontario, a top-tier gold mining jurisdiction. The company controls 15,000 hectares with over 57 kilometres of strike along two major gold-bearing structures, strategically positioned between Equinox Gold’s Greenstone Mine and Brookbank Deposit, highlighting significant exploration and value-creation potential.

Kelso Technologies ( (TSE:KLS) ) has issued an announcement.

Kelso Technologies Inc. has filed a Form 6-K with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission in March 2026, submitting a Notice of Meeting and Record Date for its upcoming security holder session. The filing, signed by Chief Executive Officer Frank Busch on March 20, 2026, formalizes regulatory disclosure for U.S. investors and aligns the company with cross-border reporting standards.

The company has scheduled its Annual General Meeting of security holders for June 4, 2026, in Vancouver, British Columbia, with April 16, 2026 set as the record date for notice, voting, and beneficial ownership determination. Kelso will use notice-and-access for both registered and beneficial holders and will pay for delivery to objecting beneficial owners, signaling an effort to streamline proxy distribution while ensuring broad shareholder participation in governance matters.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:KLS) stock is a Hold with a C$0.18 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Kelso Technologies stock, see the TSE:KLS Stock Forecast page.

The score is primarily held back by ongoing losses and only marginally positive operating cash flow, despite improving revenue and positive TTM free cash flow. A conservative balance sheet helps reduce risk, while technical indicators are mostly neutral and valuation remains constrained by negative earnings and no dividend.

To see Spark’s full report on KLS stock, click here.

More about Kelso Technologies

Kelso Technologies Inc. is a foreign private issuer listed in the U.S. that operates through a Canadian corporate structure, with its principal executive office in West Kelowna, British Columbia. The company’s common shares trade under Canadian securities regulations, and it engages a transfer agent to manage shareholder communications and meeting logistics, reflecting a dispersed investor base across registered and beneficial holders.

data.title: Webuild wins €117 million smart bypass contract in Piedmont
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Webuild SpA ( (IT:WBD) ) has issued an update.

Webuild, through its subsidiary Cossi Costruzioni, has secured a €117 million contract from ANAS to build the new Mondovì bypass on the SS28 in Piedmont, aimed at easing congestion and improving links between the A6 Torino–Savona motorway and the Cuneo valleys. The 3 km project includes the San Lorenzo tunnel, an artificial tunnel and the Ellero viaduct, which will feature continuous IoT-based structural monitoring to track bridge stability and hydrogeological conditions in real time.

The construction site will employ about 150 workers and adopt circular-economy practices such as full water recovery and reuse, dust-reduction barriers and wildlife protection measures including deterrents and mobile crossings. The contract underscores Webuild’s strategy of leveraging the specialist know-how of Cossi Costruzioni in complex tunnels and viaducts to boost industrial capacity, raise construction standards and reinforce its position in Italy’s strategic transport infrastructure market.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:WBD) stock is a Buy with a EUR3.40 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Webuild SpA stock, see the IT:WBD Stock Forecast page.

More about Webuild SpA

Webuild is a global leader in large, complex infrastructure construction, specialising in sustainable mobility, hydroelectric power, water management and green buildings. Active in around 50 countries with a 120-year track record and €13.6 billion in 2025 revenues, it is listed in Milan and has a strong ESG focus, with most of its backlog aligned to UN sustainable development goals.

Average Trading Volume: 2,926,308

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: €2.33B
